name: Shrimp Floridan En Papilate
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook, peel and clean the shrimp, then let them cool.
2. Blend together the cheeses and sour cream until smooth and even.
3. Add the chopped garlic and parsley, mixing well.
4. Incorporate the wine (adjust more or less to achieve desired thickness).
5. Place about 4 oz of the mixture on a piece of foil.
6. Arrange 8 shrimp (or more) on top of the mixture.
7. Place a lemon wedge on each package.
8. Fold over two sides of the foil, then the ends, creating a tight seal to prevent leaking.
9. Bake in an oven at 350°F for about 15 minutes.
10. The cheese sauce from shrimp is delicious on baked potato!
